description: An agent must analyze the results of an A/B test to determine if a new website design increased conversion rates.

nodes.task_description: Load the A/B test results, which include visitor counts and conversion counts for version A (control) and version B (treatment).
Calculate the conversion rate for both version A and version B.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the two conversion rates.

nodes.task_description: Perform a statistical significance test (e.g., chi-squared test) to determine if the difference in conversion rates is statistically significant.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly performs the test and reports the p-value.

nodes.task_description: Make a recommendation based on the results.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends launching version B because it showed a statistically significant increase in conversions.
